title: App Device Launch
description: A cinematic app launch with real 3D device models, live product UI, depth choreography, and a decisive brand outro.

source.name: iPolloWork · HyperFrames
source.attribution: Original iPolloWork composition adapted from HyperFrames 3D device showcase patterns; local models and runtime assets are vendored for deterministic rendering.

applyChecklist: Replace the product story and feature copy without changing the device choreography.
Replace the brand logo through the editable logo slot when needed.
Keep product UI inside the device stage and keep the primary message above the caption-safe band.
Verify local model files, WebGL preview, CSS fallback, and final render before delivery.
